title: Pong
tagline: The Phase 4 milestone: a playable Pong built unassisted from the stock scaffold.

agent.harness: Spectral — zxs CLI, scaffold CLAUDE.md playbook, docs/ references

prompt: Starting point: the stock `zxs new pong` QAOP skeleton (no game code). The agent was driven only by the scaffold playbook — no human help.
controls: Q = paddle up · A = paddle down. The right paddle is a ball-tracking AI.
